welcomeMessage: Hello and welcome to Aoshihua Machinery! I am your intelligent customer service assistant. I can help you learn about our products, technical solutions, after-sales service and more. How may I assist you today?
fallbackMessage: Sorry, I couldn't find an accurate answer for that. Please leave your [name + phone + requirements], and our professional consultant will contact you within 30 minutes, or call our service hotline 400-888-6688 directly.
humanHandoffMessage: Understood. You have been transferred to human support. Please leave your name, contact number and specific requirements below. Our sales engineer will get back to you as soon as possible.

knowledge.response: Aoshihua Machinery mainly offers four categories of feed machinery: premix units, feed mixing equipment, dust removal equipment, and hammer mills. Each category includes multiple specifications to meet different production capacity needs. You can visit the 'Products' page for details, or leave your contact information for a customized selection proposal.

Our premix units include the SZJ series conventional premix units and SLH stainless steel premix units, suitable for livestock and poultry premix, aquatic premix and feed additive production. The equipment features accurate batching, uniform mixing and low residue.

Aoshihua Machinery's feed mixing equipment includes SWH twin-shaft paddle mixers and SJJ ribbon mixers. Twin-shaft paddle mixers offer short mixing time and high uniformity; ribbon mixers provide gentle blending, ideal for premix and additives.

We provide two major types of dust removal equipment: TBLM pulse jet bag filters and WJF Venturi dust collectors, widely used at dust-generating points such as feeding inlets, hammer mills, mixers and packing machines in feed mills, with dust removal efficiency up to 99.5%.

Aoshihua Machinery's SFSP series hammer mills include conventional hammer mills and water-drop type ultra-fine pulverizers, suitable for grinding corn, soybean meal and other raw materials, as well as ultra-fine grinding for aquatic and pet feed. High efficiency, low energy consumption and uniform particle size.

Equipment prices vary depending on model, configuration and production capacity. To provide you with an accurate quotation, please leave your name, phone number, required equipment type and capacity requirements, and our sales engineer will contact you soon.

Aoshihua Machinery provides comprehensive after-sales service: one-year equipment warranty, lifetime technical support, 7×24 hotline response, and nationwide installation, commissioning, operation training and spare parts supply.

You can call our national service hotline 400-888-6688, or email us at sales@aoshihua-mfg.com. Company address: No. 88 Aoshihua Road, Wujin High-Tech Industrial Development Zone, Changzhou, Jiangsu, China.

Aoshihua Machinery Manufacturing Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008, specializing in the R&D, production and sales of feed machinery. Our products are exported to over 60 countries and regions. With more than 50 patents, the company is recognized as a provincial high-tech enterprise.

We can provide customized feed processing production line solutions based on your raw materials, capacity, site layout and budget. Please leave your contact information, and our technical team will make a detailed plan for you.
